tasks.sql:
SELECT SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl_sum
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT = TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT INN) AS total_clients
FROM client_product

SELECT 
    SEG,
    AVG(CA_LCY_SUM) AS AVG_CA_LCY_SUM
FROM 
    client_product
WHERE 
    MONTH_DT >= TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND MONTH_DT < TO_DATE('2024-04-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND CA_LCY_SUM IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    SEG
ORDER BY 
    SEG

SELECT 
    TO_CHAR(MONTH_DT, 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS new_clients_count
FROM 
    client_product
WHERE 
    TO_CHAR(MONTH_DT, 'YYYY') = '2024'
    AND CREATE_DT IS NOT NULL
    AND (CREATE_DT <= MONTH_DT OR MONTH_DT = (SELECT MAX(MONTH_DT) FROM client_product))
    AND (CREATE_DT = (SELECT MIN(CREATE_DT) FROM client_product WHERE TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(MONTH_DT, 'YYYY-MM'))
         OR CREATE_DT = (SELECT MIN(CREATE_DT) FROM client_product WHERE TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(MONTH_DT, 'YYYY-MM') AND CREATE_DT <= MONTH_DT))
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM client_product cp_prev 
        WHERE cp_prev.INN = client_product.INN 
          AND TO_CHAR(cp_prev.MONTH_DT, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(client_product.MONTH_DT - INTERVAL '1' MONTH, 'YYYY-MM')
          AND cp_prev.CREATE_DT IS NOT NULL
    )
GROUP BY 
    TO_CHAR(MONTH_DT, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY 
    month

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM MONTH_DT) = 3 THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS q3,
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM MONTH_DT) = 4 THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS q4,
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM MONTH_DT) = 4 THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM MONTH_DT) = 3 THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS delta,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM MONTH_DT) = 3 THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (
            (SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM MONTH_DT) = 4 THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) - 
             SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM MONTH_DT) = 3 THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END)) / 
            SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM MONTH_DT) = 3 THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END)
        ) * 100
    END AS delta_pct
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT >= TO_DATE('2024-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  AND MONTH_DT < TO_DATE('2025-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM MONTH_DT) = 2024

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN PL_CA ELSE 0 END) AS PL_CA,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN PL_DEP ELSE 0 END) AS PL_DEP,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN PL_VK ELSE 0 END) AS PL_VK,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN PL_VK_OUT ELSE 0 END) AS PL_VK_OUT,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN FX_MARGIN_RUB ELSE 0 END) AS FX_MARGIN_RUB,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN VED_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS VED_SUM,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN PNL_SUM - (PL_CA + PL_DEP + PL_VK + PL_VK_OUT + FX_MARGIN_RUB + VED_SUM) ELSE 0 END) AS OTHER,
    SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN PNL_SUM ELSE 0 END) AS PNL_TOTAL
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  AND (CLOSE_DT IS NULL OR CLOSE_DT >= TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
  AND CREATE_DT <= TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

WITH quarterly_data AS (
    SELECT 
        INN,
        MONTH_DT,
        PNL_SUM,
        FX_VOLUME_RUB
    FROM client_product
    WHERE MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') 
                       AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
      AND CLOSE_DT IS NULL OR CLOSE_DT >= TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
      AND CREATE_DT <= TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
),
monthly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        INN,
        SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl,
        SUM(FX_VOLUME_RUB) AS total_fx_volume
    FROM quarterly_data
    GROUP BY INN
),
ranked_clients AS (
    SELECT 
        INN,
        total_pnl,
        total_fx_volume,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_pnl DESC) AS rn
    FROM monthly_totals
),
monthly_fx AS (
    SELECT 
        INN,
        TO_CHAR(MONTH_DT, 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
        FX_VOLUME_RUB
    FROM quarterly_data
)
SELECT 
    rc.INN,
    mf1.month || ': ' || mf1.FX_VOLUME_RUB AS fx_volume_jan,
    mf2.month || ': ' || mf2.FX_VOLUME_RUB AS fx_volume_feb,
    mf3.month || ': ' || mf3.FX_VOLUME_RUB AS fx_volume_mar
FROM ranked_clients rc
LEFT JOIN monthly_fx mf1 ON rc.INN = mf1.INN AND mf1.month = '2024-01'
LEFT JOIN monthly_fx mf2 ON rc.INN = mf2.INN AND mf2.month = '2024-02'
LEFT JOIN monthly_fx mf3 ON rc.INN = mf3.INN AND mf3.month = '2024-03'
WHERE rc.rn <= 3
ORDER BY rc.total_pnl DESC

SELECT DISTINCT c1.INN
FROM client_product c1
WHERE c1.MONTH_DT >= TO_DATE('2025-10-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  AND c1.MONTH_DT < TO_DATE('2026-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  AND c1.VED_VOL > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM client_product c2
    WHERE c2.INN = c1.INN
      AND c2.MONTH_DT >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
      AND c2.MONTH_DT < TO_DATE('2025-10-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
      AND c2.VED_VOL > 0
  )
  AND c1.MONTH_DT IN (
    TO_DATE('2025-10-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    TO_DATE('2025-11-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    TO_DATE('2025-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  )

SELECT SUM(PNL_SUM) AS total_pnl
FROM client_product
WHERE MONTH_DT = (SELECT MAX(MONTH_DT) FROM client_product)

SELECT 
    SEG,
    AVG(PNL_SUM) AS AVG_PNL_SUM,
    AVG(CA_LCY_SUM) AS AVG_CA_LCY_SUM,
    SUM(FX_VOLUME_RUB) AS TOTAL_FX_VOLUME_RUB
FROM 
    client_product
WHERE 
    MONTH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE('2024-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2024-03-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND MONTH_DT = LAST_DAY(MONTH_DT)  -- только закрытые месяцы (конец месяца)
GROUP BY 
    SEG
ORDER BY 
    AVG_PNL_SUM DESC

SELECT 
    MAX(CA_LCY_SUM) AS credit_load,
    MAX(CA_LCY_RUB_SUM) AS overdue_amount
FROM 
    client_product
WHERE 
    INN = '025000000000' 
    AND ORGANIZATION_NM = 'ПАО ЛУКОЙЛ'
    AND MONTH_DT = (SELECT MAX(MONTH_DT) FROM client_product WHERE INN = '025000000000' AND ORGANIZATION_NM = 'ПАО ЛУКОЙЛ')
